title: 2025-2026: Exfiltration After Initial Access
description: Finds large outbound transfers and firewall data-theft alerts tied to ClickFix/CrashFix, web-to-cloud, and cloud identity abuse traces.
query: ('Trace ID' = 'trace_clickfix_2026_001' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_w2c_entry_001' or 'Trace ID' = 'trace_aitm_token_2026_001' or 'Threat Name' = 'ClickFix Data Exfiltration' or 'Threat Name' = 'Suspicious Data Exfiltration' or 'Resource Name' like '*payroll-may-2026.csv*' or 'Resource Name' like '*customer-export-2026-05.csv*') and ('Log Source' = 'SOC VCN Flow Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Network Firewall Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Audit Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs') | stats count as Evidence, unique('Bytes Sent') as BytesSent, unique('Resource Name') as Resources, unique('Threat Name') as Threats by 'Log Source', 'Destination IP', 'User Name', 'Trace ID' | sort -Evidence

ask_ai_prompts: Which data objects or destinations are tied to exfiltration?
Identify the entry point and compromised machines for each exfiltration trace.

falsepositives: Scheduled backup or export jobs already tagged as demo traffic
